name: Recent Install - Non-Battery DTC (P0420)
description: EXPLORATORY (OQ#12): caller reports a catalytic-converter code unrelated to the battery.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: After my battery install the light came on and the scan shows P0420 - is my new battery defective?
expectedOutcome: Agent should recognize P0420 is not a hybrid-battery code and avoid implying the battery is at fault; guide toward proper diagnosis. RECORD ACTUAL BEHAVIOR (redirection target is an open question).
